name: Nevada City Chamber
notes: Static HTML. Essential Grid plugin events. No Selenium needed.

name: GV Chamber
notes: Static HTML. Elementor page — manually coded events, ~5-10 per month. Chamber meetings, mixers, workshops.

name: KVMR
notes: Tribe Events REST API (wp-json/tribe/events/v1). Consolidator — community events across the county with venue city, organizer, and the original event URL. City-allowlist region filter; merge dedupes reposts against direct sources by URL+date. Runs last in ALL_SCRAPERS so direct sources win.

name: Eventbrite Nevada
notes: React-rendered. Filtered to Nevada County locations only.

name: The Union
notes: RSS-first, Selenium fallback. Events behind paywall — RSS often fails.

name: Go Nevada County
notes: DISABLED — site returns 403 to headless Chrome (Cloudflare protection).

name: Center for the Arts
notes: Concert venue in Grass Valley. requests-first, Selenium fallback. ~30-50 events / 6 months.

name: Miners Foundry
notes: Cultural Center in Nevada City. Selenium required (site 403s direct HTTP).

name: NCAC Calendar
notes: Trumba JSON feed (https://www.trumba.com/calendars/nevada-county-arts-council.json). The Squarespace page embeds a Trumba widget — we hit Trumba directly. ~180 western Nevada County events; Truckee/Tahoe filtered out.

name: Nevada County Fairgrounds
notes: Saffire JSONP feed (services/eventsservice.asmx/GetEventsJsonP). Returns the venue's featured events -- Strawberry, Father's Day Bluegrass, High Sierra, Nevada County Fair, Draft Horse Classic, Country Christmas Faire, etc. No auth, no Selenium.

name: Bear Yuba Land Trust
notes: Event Organiser iCal feed (?feed=eo-events). Guided hikes, trail art installations, hike challenges, Celebration of Trails. Multi-day programs anchored to their end date so they stay visible while running. No Selenium.

name: Go Nevada County Festivals
notes: DISABLED — site returns 403 to both requests AND headless Chrome (Cloudflare protection). The 13 festivals listed are already in our hardcoded EVENTS array (Cornish Christmas, Wild & Scenic, etc.).
